channel.title: Notes 🤓 on Sukalaper Home
channel.description: Recent content in Notes 🤓 on Sukalaper Home

item.description: 👻 Sebagai tambahan informasi blog ini dibuat dengan spesifikasi mesin sebagai berikut. Mesin: Thinkpad X220 Thinkpad T460 Sistem operasi: Arch Linux Desktop environment Window manager: i3wm Teks editor: Emacs Vim Peramban: Qutebrowser, Firefox Look at you, you miserable fool. Get off your knees, your prayers fall upon deaf ears. Gods turned his back on you, heavens gates are shut. And now you’re knocking on the devil’s door. – Alesana - The Thespian
item.content:encoded:
👻

Sebagai tambahan informasi blog ini dibuat dengan spesifikasi mesin sebagai berikut.

  • Mesin: Thinkpad X220 Thinkpad T460
    • Sistem operasi: Arch Linux
    • Desktop environment Window manager: i3wm
    • Teks editor: Emacs Vim
    • Peramban: Qutebrowser, Firefox

Look at you, you miserable fool. Get off your knees, your prayers fall upon deaf ears. Gods turned his back on you, heavens gates are shut. And now you’re knocking on the devil’s door.

– Alesana - The Thespian

Apa yang ingin Anda lihat? Ini hanya sebuah teks buram.
